---
title: "My Projects"
listing:
  - id: lectures
    contents: "projects/lectures/index.qmd"
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    image-height: 200px

  - id: ml
    contents: "projects/machine-learning/**"
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    image-height: 200px

  - id: viz
    contents: "projects/visualizacion/**"
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    image-height: 200px
---
## Lectures
:::{#lectures}
:::

## Artificial Intelligence
:::{#ml}
:::

## Computational Physics
:::{#viz}
:::

---
